episodes.title: Cult Leader's Violent End - The “Krishna Venta" Story. Mentor of Manson.
episodes.description:
🟣  Episode: "A Victim of The Reverend May Blackburn, in LA."
https://youtu.be/A5N9mjKRCAI?si=SPGombXownN-mV5-

🟡 Check out my Book: "INTO THE UNKNOWN - True Stories of a Pilot Cheating Death" on Amazon for $12.95 USD - https://www.amazon.com/Into-Stories-Pilot-Cheating-Death/dp/B0C4WZQ4BG/ref=sr_1_1?crid=2SVX769WR6NTV&keywords=into+the+unknown+ron+carlson&qid=1683985170&sprefix=into+the+unknown+ron+carlson%2Caps%2C101&sr=8-1

THIS CHANNEL:
_________________________________________________________
The Angel face you see is the Haserot, named “The Angel of Death Victorious". The stoic angel is seated on the marble gravestone of canning entrepreneur Francis Haserot and his family. Holding an extinguished torch upside-down, it represents a symbol of life extinguished. Wings are outstretched and the gaze is straight ahead. 
IN THE END, DEATH ALWAYS WINS. LEST THE FACES NOT BE FORGOTTEN...

This channel is focused on casually walking and viewing a handful of the thousands of forgotten names and faces at various cemeteries near and afar. Seeing their faces up close. And when able, telling the stories behind their names.
 
Most graves are unknown and lost to history. 
Some are famous. 
And some infamous....
....and some with tragic endings.

#graves #crime #cemetery
